summary: The Q1 project timeline has been updated due to a client request, moving the initial prototype delivery from March 20 to March 10. This necessitates that design finalize assets by March 5 and engineering prioritize API integration this week. Progress will be reviewed in Friday's sync.
key_points: Initial prototype delivery date has been moved up to March 10 from March 20.
Design team must finalize assets by March 5.
Engineering team needs to prioritize API integration this week.
Progress review will occur in Friday's sync meeting.
action_items: Engineering: Prioritize API integration this week.
Team: Review progress in Friday's sync.
Team: Communicate any concerns to Subash.
